about.title: One operator.
about.intro: I design and ship premium showcase websites and custom SaaS for studios, independents, and small teams who care how their work looks online. One operator, one stack, full ownership of the result — no agency layers between us.

pillars.label: Long-term hosting
pillars.body: Once your site is live, I stay on as your long-term host: a private EU server, automated backups, and certificates that renew on their own.

pillars.label: Your dedicated space
pillars.body: Every client gets a private workspace in my SaaS platform: whiteboard, forums, shared docs — everything you need to collaborate on your terms.

pillars.label: Open-source native
pillars.body: I live in the open-source land — everything I build is auditable, exportable, and yours to keep.

cards.title: Handcrafted, line by line
cards.desc: Pure Next.js + Tailwind CSS. Zero WordPress, zero no-code. Clean code, no technical debt.

cards.title: Fair pricing, premium quality
cards.desc: No agency overhead. You pay for the work, not the structure. Lighthouse ≥ 90 guaranteed.

cards.title: Sovereign EU hosting
cards.desc: Hosted in Europe, in a high-security environment. Native GDPR compliance. Cloudflare included. Your data stays protected.

cards.title: Follow-up like nowhere else
cards.desc: Access to a private SaaS ecosystem: whiteboard, project notes, forum, feedback. Track progress live and get private access to advice and ideas.

portfolio.title: What I've
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects, online — each thought through and built end to end.

theboweryst.name: The boweryst
theboweryst.tagline: Showcase site for a tattoo studio in Lorient

pricing.saasNote: — Exchange forum, shared whiteboard, structured feedback and collaborative documents: private access to follow your project end to end, without going through email.

features.onepage: Static one-pager with sections (Hero, Services, About, Contact)
features.seo: SEO: meta tags, sitemap, semantic structure, audit
features.gallery: Dynamic synced gallery (Instagram or other source)

pricingMaintenance.title: Subscriptions for
pricingMaintenance.subtitle: Independent from development · Cancel anytime
pricingMaintenance.reactivityNote: — response within 72 business hours, not emergency. Premium production quality, honest timelines.

features.perfTracking: Performance tracking (Core Web Vitals, load time)
features.monthlyDebug: Monthly debug (reported bugs, no new features)
features.supportMessage: Message support — response within 72 business hours

contact.title: Let's talk about
contact.subtitle: An idea, a question? Choose the channel that suits you — I reply personally.

email.desc: For any quote request or detailed question

instagram.desc: For an informal chat or to follow my work

footer.tagline: A premium stack for your presence online.
